title: Triangle Angle
text: We have a north component (9m) and an east component (12m). The resultant points into the northeast quadrant.

title: Apply Arctan Function
text: The vector ends $$12m$$ east and $$9m$$ north of start. The compass bearing from north (clockwise) is $$\arctan\left(\frac{12}{9}\right)$$. What is this value?
